name: St. Mark
description_short: Unable to verify company details—website returns 403 Forbidden error. St. Mark's actual services, terms, and legitimacy cannot be confirmed.
description_long: St. Mark is listed in CreditDoc's payday-alternatives category, suggesting it may operate as a credit union PAL program, CDFI lender, or employer advance platform offering below-36% APR credit products. However, the company's website (https://stmarkrcc.com/) is currently inaccessible, returning a 403 Forbidden error that prevents verification of its actual business model, service offerings, regulatory status, or loan terms. Without access to official company information, claims about St. Mark's legitimacy, pricing, approval rates, or compliance cannot be substantiated. The inaccessibility raises questions about current operational status—the website may be under maintenance, the domain may be inactive, or the company may no longer be operating. Consumers should exercise caution and verify St. Mark's legitimacy through independent sources such as Better Business Bureau listings, state lending regulator databases, or NCUA records (if a credit union) before engaging. No factual assessment of this company's services, advantages, or disadvantages is possible based on available data.
